mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the unemployment rate below 7% signals tight labor market conditions that boost corporate profit margins and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 7%.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts above 900 thousand units signals strong consumer demand for durable goods and construction, boosting corporate revenues and equity valuations through the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in 50%+ of instances where HOUST exceeds 900.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in the federal funds rate and rising inflation expectations create a 'stagflationary' environment where equity valuations contract due to higher discount rates and margin pressures, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS < 1% and CPIAUCSL > 2%.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in industrial production above 100 signals recovering manufacturing activity that increases corporate earnings visibility, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 100.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent monetary tightening cycles, indicated by rising federal funds rates above 4.5%, create headwinds for equity valuations through higher discount rates and reduced corporate borrowing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained expansion in real sales (RSAFS) above 420 billion dollars signals strong consumer demand that boosts corporate revenues and equity valuations through the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in high RSAFS periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Excessively high inflation (CPIAUCSL > 235) erodes purchasing power and forces central banks to raise rates, creating a negative environment for equity valuations through the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 50%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 235.
